creator: srodawa@oakland.edu
text:
From another system, issue ftp command to netlab1, issue username and
password for legitimate user on netlab1.  Initiate transfer of a tar.gz
file to netlab1.  Ftp stalls after 1% or 2% of file transfered.  File
size was just under 1MB.  Ftp initiated from FreeBSD 3.2, FreeBSD 3.1,
NetBSD 1.3.x with same result every time.

Netlab1 is inside a 10.7.0.0/16 network with NAT (fixed mapping) to
outside network (141.210.0.0/16).  Fails whether initiating system is
inside or outside.

Fix: 

None known
How-To-Repeat: Fails EVERY attempt.  Finally had to use floppy to transfer the file.
Fails with oter files also.  Fails every time.
